subject: A large spherical spacecraft with a dome and mechanical details hovers in a blue sky; in the foreground are three humanoid figures — a tall figure wearing a cape and a small round head covering, a shorter figure with spiky hair, and a young figure with a side-ponytail — watching or reacting to the ship.
suspected_ip: Trunks, Son Goku (child), Pan — Dragon Ball franchise
description: The card depicts a large, spherical spacecraft descending or hovering against a bright blue sky backdrop. The ship has a prominent dome on top and visible mechanical panels and port holes giving it a retro-sci-fi aesthetic. Three figures appear in the lower foreground: one tall figure with a cape and a distinctive round head silhouette (likely an older character), one figure with spiky hair, and one shorter figure with a side-ponytail hairstyle. The overall feel is adventurous and optimistic — characters looking up at an arriving vessel.
foreground: Three humanoid figures standing together, looking up toward the spacecraft
background: Bright blue sky, the large spherical spaceship dominating the upper portion of the frame
emotion: Figures appear awe-struck or excited, gazing upward
